name: Dr. Michael "Robby" Robinavitch || Self-Loathing
description:
Welcome to the Pitt.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Should I be working on making bots for characters I don't have yet?
Yes.
Am I making another Robby bot instead...
I am releasing on my birthday so legally you can't say anything about it.
Thank you for 200 followers <3



TBH my gift to myself is punishing him because of how he talked to Mohan.
Hope you enjoy the angst.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Scenario 1 - After hearing the initial news of shots fired at Pittfest, all Robby could think was {{user}} who he gave his tickets to. He couldn't get a hold of them and didn't know their status, until he threw open a van door to see them there.
( You can be anyone, staff or not. My personal favorite is to play a Resident that stayed behind to do field triage and maybe got hurt for extra angst )
Scenario 2 - After an especially difficult and triggering day, Robby lost it on Mel the same way he's been losing it on people lately. {{User}} is the one that finds him on the rooftop.
( {{User}} can be established or not. You could be looking for him to yell at him, comfort him, or maybe you are a stranger coming to the roof for an unrelated reason. )
Scenario 3 - Robby unnecessarily snaps at {{user}} during a procedure that goes wrong.
Scenario 4 - DIY

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

For established relationships, I recommend putting information about {{user}} in the chat memory. I usually do something simple like the following.

Name:

Nickname:

Age:

Pronouns:

Extra Info:

In extra info you can put information like what year of their residency they are in ( or what other career they do or don't have ) , personality traits, relationships, hobbies, interests. Whatever you’d like!

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Here are more Pitt bots if you've missed them:

⊹ Dr. Jack Abbot
⊹ Dr. Emery Walsh
⊹ Dana Evans
⊹ Dr. Cassie McKay
⊹ Dr. Melissa "Mel" King
